race.comment: MYSTERY MINUTE (6) continues the great form this campaign and is building a top record this course and distance. Looks hard to beat again. INCANDESCENT LADY (8) raced on speed and was runner-up to Aardvark last time in a good form race. Jumps from a good gate and is worth following up. SIMPLY ROSSO (1) ran third in the same race and continues to race well. Looks a leading chance to be in the finish again. WEAPONS HOT (2) is a last start winner here over 1000m when he showed good speed. Tricky gate this time and up in weight but can give a sight again. GOLD SPY (4) was placed behind WEAPONS HOT in the latest and also comes through the Aardvark race the start prior. In the mix.
